/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-rpath,/home/upmys/projects/CacheServer/KCacheServer/../muduo-core/lib CMakeFiles/kcacheserver.dir/src/main.cc.o CMakeFiles/kcacheserver.dir/src/CacheServer.cc.o CMakeFiles/kcacheserver.dir/src/Protocol.cc.o -o kcacheserver  -Wl,-rpath,/home/upmys/projects/CacheServer/KCacheServer/../muduo-core/lib /home/upmys/projects/CacheServer/KCacheServer/../muduo-core/lib/libmuduo_core.so -lpthread
